html:
Exclusive to:

Pigg and Pigglet's General Store is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in Swinesbury Pig City and sells a variety of Tools, Survival items and Crafting materials to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, Pigg and Pigglet's General Store also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, three Axes and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Windows
    • 2.4 Doors
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering Pigg and Pigglet's General Store, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Banker Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

During a Pig Fiesta, Firecrackers are sold in exchange for 1 oinc. Firecrackers appear 4 times as often.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
Miner Hat 20
Bug Net 20
Fishing Rod 10
Umbrella 10
Axe 5
Pickaxe 5
Shovel 5
Machete 5
Pitchfork 5
Backpack 5
Cloth 5
Razor 3
Flint 1
Firecrackers 1

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Cut Grass 1 4
Rocks 1 4

Decor

  • Sacle
  • Pans
  • Troughshelf Sidewall

Shelfs

  • Carved Bookshelf

Pillar

  • Planed Wood Column Corner
  • Planed Wood Column Front

Windows

Doors

  • Exit

Trivia

  • Before the introduction of the Swinesbury Mineral Exchange, Pigg and Pigglet's General Store also used to sell Gold Nuggets.

Gallery

  • The interior of Pigg and Pigglet's General Store.
  • Unused Burnt
  • Unused Burnt Broken
  • Unused Side
  • Unused Side
  • Unused Burnt
  • Unused Burnt Broken

“A common store full of common goods.”
–Wilson
“I wonder if they have matches.”
–Willow
“Many things inside little shop.”
–Wolfgang
“Contains things to sustain this empty life.”
–Wendy
“PLACE OF TANGIBLE GOODS”
–WX-78
“A place to purchase goods.”
–Wickerbottom
“I wouldn't mind popping in.”
–Woodie
“A common boutique to purchase common goods.”
–Maxwell
“A kaleidoscope of goods within. Though sadly not a kaleidoscope.”
–Wagstaff
“Let the bartering cömmence!”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe they have fang wax.”
–Webber
“I could always pick up a thing or two.”
–Walani
“I may want to pick up a thing or two.”
–Warly
“Thar b'no treasure t'be had inside.”
–Woodlegs
“STUFFS CONTAINETH'DED HERE IN”
–Wilba
“Sells stuff”
–Wormwood
“What kind of a general store doesn't sell hot air balloons?”
–Wheeler

'''Pigg and Pigglet's General Store''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in [[Pig City|Swinesbury Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[Tools Tab|Tools]], [[Survival Tab|Survival]] items and [[Crafting]] materials to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], Pigg and Pigglet's General Store also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Boards]], three [[Axe]]s and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering Pigg and Pigglet's General Store, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. A [[Banker Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.

During a [[Pig Fiesta]], [[Red Firecrackers|Firecrackers]] are sold in exchange for 1 oinc. Firecrackers appear 4 times as often.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:
